plan.rationale: Enabled tests per manifest: unit and security. Unit: Project uses Vitest with tests in tests/**/*.test.ts (configured in vitest.config.ts) targeting src/**/*.ts; run via npm test within 60s timeout. Security: Perform dependency vulnerability scan (npm audit) and static analysis (Semgrep JS/TS rules) within 120s timeout to detect known vulnerabilities and insecure patterns in source code.

results.name: addTask should add a task with default priority
addTask should assign incrementing ids
completeTask should mark task as done
completeTask should return false for non-existent id
filterByPriority should return only tasks matching the priority
completionPercentage should return 50 when half are done
completionPercentage should return 0 when none are done
searchTasks should find tasks case-insensitively
sortTasks should sort by priority then title
getTasks should return a copy of tasks

results.name: semgrep_typescript
playwright_typescript
npm-audit_typescript

test_result.name: filterByPriority should return only tasks matching the priority

findings.recommendation: Fix filterByPriority to strictly filter tasks whose priority equals the requested value; handle undefined/null priorities and add tests for edge cases.

test_result.name: completionPercentage should return 50 when half are done

findings.recommendation: Update completionPercentage to compute Math.round((completed/total) * 100) and ensure correct handling when half are done.

test_result.name: completionPercentage should return 0 when none are done

findings.recommendation: Guard against zero totals and return 0 when none are done; avoid NaN by short-circuiting when total === 0.
Make searchTasks case-insensitive by normalizing both query and searchable fields (e.g., toLowerCase); add tests for mixed-case inputs.

findings.recommendation: Pin jest in devDependencies (avoid auto-install), run a clean install, and update/replace packages pulling in deprecated inflight (e.g., upgrade deps or use overrides/resolutions) to remove the deprecation.
Inspect Playwright logs/trace (run with --trace=on), ensure browsers are installed (npx playwright install), verify base URL/env/auth setup in CI, and fix failing selectors or app regressions.

test_result.name: filterByPriority should return only tasks matching the priority

findings.recommendation: Same as #1: ensure filterByPriority strictly filters by the given priority and covers null/undefined cases with tests.

test_result.name: completionPercentage should return 50 when half are done

findings.recommendation: Same as #2: compute percentage as Math.round((completed/total) * 100) and validate the 50% case.

test_result.name: completionPercentage should return 0 when none are done

findings.recommendation: Same as #3: return 0 when none are done and handle total === 0 safely.
Same as #4: implement case-insensitive task search by normalizing strings prior to comparison.

summary: Ran 28 tests across 2 languages (javascript, typescript). Tools: jest, npm-audit, playwright, semgrep, vitest. 16 passed, 12 failed, 0 healed. Findings: 10 high, 2 low
